Title: Login with valid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter a valid username. | Enter a valid password. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Login with invalid username
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter an invalid username. | Enter a valid password. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message: 'Invalid username or password.' and remains on login page.

Title: Login with invalid password
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter a valid username. | Enter an invalid password. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message: 'Invalid username or password.' and remains on login page.

Title: Login with empty username
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Leave the username field empty. | Enter a valid password. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message: 'Username is required.' and cannot login.

Title: Login with empty password
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter a valid username. | Leave the password field empty. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message: 'Password is required.' and cannot login.

Title: Login with empty username and password
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Leave the username field empty. | Leave the password field empty. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User sees error messages: 'Username is required.' and 'Password is required.' and cannot login.

Title: Login with special characters in username
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter special characters in the username field (e.g., '!@#$%'). | Enter a valid password. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message: 'Invalid username or password.' and remains on login page.

Title: Login with very long username and password
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter a username exceeding the maximum allowed characters (e.g., 256 characters). | Enter a password exceeding the maximum allowed characters (e.g., 256 characters). | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message: 'Invalid username or password.' or input is truncated to maximum allowed characters.

Title: Login with leading/trailing spaces in username and password
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter a valid username with leading and trailing spaces. | Enter a valid password with leading and trailing spaces. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: Login succeeds if spaces are trimmed; login fails if spaces are considered.

Title: Login with case sensitivity in username and password
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: Enter the correct username with different case (e.g., uppercase/lowercase mismatch). | Enter the correct password with different case. | Click the Login button.
Expected Result: Login fails if fields are case sensitive; login succeeds if fields are case insensitive.
